{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Quality Assurance Officer",
  "description": "Grand Oak Limited (GOL) -&nbsp;We are the largest Manufacturer of SpiritsandWines, we believe our spirits should have character; an authenticity derived from where they are distilled, bottled and the philosophies of those who distil them.&nbsp;There are many attributes that describe us resolute, self-sufficient, tough, hard-working, enduring, emotional, passionate, philosophical and engaging.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Assurance Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Sango Ota, Ogun

Job Description
Principal Accountabilties:


	Perform pre-line analysis before production begins to verify equipment readiness and ensure operational conditions meet standards, so as to address potential disruptions and maintain efficiency.
	Carryout detailed inspections of raw materials, in-process production, and finished goods to verify compliance with quality standards and specifications to ensure early detection and prevention of quality issues.
	Adhere to safety and hygiene protocols and regulatory requirements during inspections to maintain a safe working environment and compliance with industry standards.
	Monitor the dispensing of recipes for blending to ensure accuracy and consistency in production processes, thereby maintaining product integrity, meeting quality standards, and ensuring uniformity in the final product.
	Implement Hazard Analysis Critical Control Point (HACCP) principles to systematically identify, evaluate, and control food safety hazards throughout the production process, ensuring the production of safe and high-quality products.
	Record and report inspection findings accurately and promptly, documenting any deviations or non-conformities to ensure transparent communication across the quality assurance chain, facilitate timely corrective actions, and uphold regulatory compliance and product integrity standards.


Challenges:


	Unstable Machine Performance
	Limited resources and budget
	Pressure to meet both target and quality at the same time
	Achieving zero defects on all products, lines and packaging materials
	The job requires lots of documentation
	Limited skilled labour.


Framework &amp; Boundaries:


	This includes implementing quality and safety protocols such as HACCP, ensuring compliance with regulatory standards, while his boundaries encompass operational constraints and adherence to production schedules and protocols.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an OND qualification with 1 - 4 years of work experience.


Salary
N70,000 monthly.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

Quality Assurance Officer Job at Grand Oak Limited (GOL)




        
    

        
        Grand Oak Limited (GOL) - We are the largest Manufacturer of SpiritsandWines, we believe our spirits should have character; an authenticity derived from where they are distilled, bottled and the philosophies of those who distil them. There are many attributes that describe us resolute, self-sufficient, tough, hard-working, enduring, emotional, passionate, philosophical and engaging.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Assurance Officer

Job Location: Sango Ota, Ogun

Job Description
Principal Accountabilties:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Perform pre-line analysis before production begins to verify equipment readiness and ensure operational conditions meet standards, so as to address potential disruptions and maintain efficiency.
	Carryout detailed inspections of raw materials, in-process production, and finished goods to verify compliance with quality standards and specifications to ensure early detection and prevention of quality issues.
	Adhere to safety and hygiene protocols and regulatory requirements during inspections to maintain a safe working environment and compliance with industry standards.
	Monitor the dispensing of recipes for blending to ensure accuracy and consistency in production processes, thereby maintaining product integrity, meeting quality standards, and ensuring uniformity in the final product.
	Implement Hazard Analysis Critical Control Point (HACCP) principles to systematically identify, evaluate, and control food safety hazards throughout the production process, ensuring the production of safe and high-quality products.
	Record and report inspection findings accurately and promptly, documenting any deviations or non-conformities to ensure transparent communication across the quality assurance chain, facilitate timely corrective actions, and uphold regulatory compliance and product integrity standards.


Challenges:


	Unstable Machine Performance
	Limited resources and budget
	Pressure to meet both target and quality at the same time
	Achieving zero defects on all products, lines and packaging materials
	The job requires lots of documentation
	Limited skilled labour.


Framework & Boundaries:


	This includes implementing quality and safety protocols such as HACCP, ensuring compliance with regulatory standards, while his boundaries encompass operational constraints and adherence to production schedules and protocols.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an OND qualification with 1 - 4 years of work experience.


Salary
N70,000 monthly.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Project Engineer",
  "description": "Ardrend Limited is an innovative engineering company that specializes in providing advanced blasting, corrosion management, and robotic tank cleaning solutions to various industries such as oil and gas, marine, production, aeronautics, engineering, manufacturing, and energy.&nbsp;

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Port&nbsp;Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Prepare technical proposals for project bids and tenders.
	Carry out project site inspections/feasibility study, write a report on findings and give recommendations.
	Carry out a pre-project site survey to develop project design and eliminate and solve anticipated challenges to project delivery.
	Review project inspection and test plan (ITP), work method statement and safety policies with the QAQC Manager.
	Prepare project schedule, Personnel Assignment plans, Equipment assignment plan, procurement plan for the completion of all work described in the Contract Agreement per the Scope of Work and Technical Requirements.
	Perform engineering calculations and design a scheme or project concept using computer-aided design (CAD)
	Prepare CAD drawings of the site layout and position for equipment to be spotted on site.
	Ensure the project complies with applicable codes, practices, policies, performance standards, and specifications.
	Coordinate site personnel, monitor progress, prepare, and submit project reports, and maintain communication with various stakeholders to facilitate successful project completion
	Carry out parameter checks (gas testing, NDT) before commencement of operations


Qualifications and Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Engineering (Mechanical, Electrical, Mechatronics, Petroleum, Marine, or related discipline).
	2&ndash;5 years of relevant experience in site operations, project execution, engineering support, or technical field operations.
	A relevant postgraduate qualification is an added advantage.
	Professional certifications or training in project management, robotics, inspection, or QA/QC are desirable.
	Proven experience supporting project supervisors or managers on construction, inspection, or industrial project sites.
	Hands-on experience with site surveys, feasibility studies, project planning, and execution.
	Exposure to robotic operations (ROVs, NDT tools, inspection equipment) is a strong advantage.

Project Engineer Job at Ardrend Limited




        
    

        
        Ardrend Limited is an innovative engineering company that specializes in providing advanced blasting, corrosion management, and robotic tank cleaning solutions to various industries such as oil and gas, marine, production, aeronautics, engineering, manufacturing, and energy. 

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Engineer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Prepare technical proposals for project bids and tenders.
	Carry out project site inspections/feasibility study, write a report on findings and give recommendations.
	Carry out a pre-project site survey to develop project design and eliminate and solve anticipated challenges to project delivery.
	Review project inspection and test plan (ITP), work method statement and safety policies with the QAQC Manager.
	Prepare project schedule, Personnel Assignment plans, Equipment assignment plan, procurement plan for the completion of all work described in the Contract Agreement per the Scope of Work and Technical Requirements.
	Perform engineering calculations and design a scheme or project concept using computer-aided design (CAD)
	Prepare CAD drawings of the site layout and position for equipment to be spotted on site.
	Ensure the project complies with applicable codes, practices, policies, performance standards, and specifications.
	Coordinate site personnel, monitor progress, prepare, and submit project reports, and maintain communication with various stakeholders to facilitate successful project completion
	Carry out parameter checks (gas testing, NDT) before commencement of operations


Qualifications and Experience


	Bachelor’s degree in Engineering (Mechanical, Electrical, Mechatronics, Petroleum, Marine, or related discipline).
	2–5 years of relevant experience in site operations, project execution, engineering support, or technical field operations.
	A relevant postgraduate qualification is an added advantage.
	Professional certifications or training in project management, robotics, inspection, or QA/QC are desirable.
	Proven experience supporting project supervisors or managers on construction, inspection, or industrial project sites.
	Hands-on experience with site surveys, feasibility studies, project planning, and execution.
	Exposure to robotic operations (ROVs, NDT tools, inspection equipment) is a strong advantage.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager",
  "description": "Lifted Horizon Nigeria Limited - We are into Lifted Horizon Advisory Services; Accounting and Tax Advisory, Financial Planning, Risk Management and Control and Legal and Regulatory Services, Lifted Horizon Solution Services; IT Solutions, Software Development and Lifted Horizon Logistics; Cargo and Shipping, Import and Export.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja,&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We are seeking a creative, strategic, and performance-driven Social Media Manager to lead the digital presence of our short-let and Airbnb property portfolio.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for showcasing our properties in a compelling way, driving bookings through social media, and building a strong lifestyle-driven brand that attracts both local and international guests.
	This role is not just about posting content ; it is about turning our properties into desirable experiences and converting online visibility into occupancy and revenue.


Key Responsibilities
Content Strategy &amp; Brand Positioning:


	Develop and execute a social media strategy focused on increasing bookings, occupancy rates, and brand visibility.
	Position properties as premium lifestyle experiences, not just accommodation.
	Create content themes around travel, luxury stays, guest experiences, and local attractions.


Content Creation &amp; Management;


	Create, curate, and publish high-quality content (photos, reels, videos, stories) showcasing properties.
	Work with photographers, videographers, and property managers to capture engaging visual content.
	Write compelling captions and listing descriptions that drive engagement and bookings.
	Maintain a consistent, aspirational brand aesthetic across all platforms.


Booking &amp; Conversion Focus;


	Drive traffic from social media platforms to booking channels (Airbnb, direct booking sites, WhatsApp, etc.).
	Run campaigns to promote occupancy during low seasons and boost last-minute bookings.
	Collaborate with sales/property teams to highlight available listings in real time.


Community &amp; Guest Engagement:


	Respond to inquiries, comments, and messages promptly and professionally.
	Build trust with potential guests through engaging storytelling and social proof.
	Share user-generated content, guest reviews, and testimonials.


Campaigns &amp; Promotions:


	Plan and execute promotional campaigns (holiday deals, weekend stays, long-stay discounts).
	Collaborate with influencers, travel bloggers, and lifestyle creators to increase reach.
	Support property launches and new listing announcements.


Analytics &amp; Performance Tracking:


	Monitor key metrics such as engagement rate, reach, clicks, inquiries, and booking conversions.
	Provide weekly/monthly reports with insights and growth recommendations.
	Use data to refine content strategy and improve ROI.


Requirements


	Proven experience as a Social Media Manager (preferably in real estate, hospitality, travel, or lifestyle brands).
	Strong visual storytelling and content creation skills.
	Excellent copywriting ability with a marketing-driven mindset.
	Experience managing Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and WhatsApp Business.
	Strong understanding of how social media drives bookings and conversions.
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple property listings.
	Basic knowledge of Canva, Meta Business Suite, and analytics tools.


Preferred Skills:


	Experience in Airbnb/short-let or hospitality marketing.
	Video editing skills (CapCut, InShot, Premiere Pro, etc.).
	Influencer marketing experience.
	Understanding of pricing/occupancy strategies is a plus.


Salary
250,000.00 (NGN) per month.&nbsp;

What We Offer:


	Opportunity to build a high-growth lifestyle and hospitality brand.
	Creative freedom to shape how properties are positioned in the market.
	Direct impact on bookings, revenue, and brand growth.
	Fast-paced, entrepreneurial work environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@liftedhorizonng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.&nbsp;",

Social Media Manager Job at Lifted Horizon Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Lifted Horizon Nigeria Limited - We are into Lifted Horizon Advisory Services; Accounting and Tax Advisory, Financial Planning, Risk Management and Control and Legal and Regulatory Services, Lifted Horizon Solution Services; IT Solutions, Software Development and Lifted Horizon Logistics; Cargo and Shipping, Import and Export.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a creative, strategic, and performance-driven Social Media Manager to lead the digital presence of our short-let and Airbnb property portfolio.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for showcasing our properties in a compelling way, driving bookings through social media, and building a strong lifestyle-driven brand that attracts both local and international guests.
	This role is not just about posting content ; it is about turning our properties into desirable experiences and converting online visibility into occupancy and revenue.


Key Responsibilities
Content Strategy & Brand Positioning:


	Develop and execute a social media strategy focused on increasing bookings, occupancy rates, and brand visibility.
	Position properties as premium lifestyle experiences, not just accommodation.
	Create content themes around travel, luxury stays, guest experiences, and local attractions.


Content Creation & Management;


	Create, curate, and publish high-quality content (photos, reels, videos, stories) showcasing properties.
	Work with photographers, videographers, and property managers to capture engaging visual content.
	Write compelling captions and listing descriptions that drive engagement and bookings.
	Maintain a consistent, aspirational brand aesthetic across all platforms.


Booking & Conversion Focus;


	Drive traffic from social media platforms to booking channels (Airbnb, direct booking sites, WhatsApp, etc.).
	Run campaigns to promote occupancy during low seasons and boost last-minute bookings.
	Collaborate with sales/property teams to highlight available listings in real time.


Community & Guest Engagement:


	Respond to inquiries, comments, and messages promptly and professionally.
	Build trust with potential guests through engaging storytelling and social proof.
	Share user-generated content, guest reviews, and testimonials.


Campaigns & Promotions:


	Plan and execute promotional campaigns (holiday deals, weekend stays, long-stay discounts).
	Collaborate with influencers, travel bloggers, and lifestyle creators to increase reach.
	Support property launches and new listing announcements.


Analytics & Performance Tracking:


	Monitor key metrics such as engagement rate, reach, clicks, inquiries, and booking conversions.
	Provide weekly/monthly reports with insights and growth recommendations.
	Use data to refine content strategy and improve ROI.


Requirements


	Proven experience as a Social Media Manager (preferably in real estate, hospitality, travel, or lifestyle brands).
	Strong visual storytelling and content creation skills.
	Excellent copywriting ability with a marketing-driven mindset.
	Experience managing Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and WhatsApp Business.
	Strong understanding of how social media drives bookings and conversions.
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple property listings.
	Basic knowledge of Canva, Meta Business Suite, and analytics tools.


Preferred Skills:


	Experience in Airbnb/short-let or hospitality marketing.
	Video editing skills (CapCut, InShot, Premiere Pro, etc.).
	Influencer marketing experience.
	Understanding of pricing/occupancy strategies is a plus.


Salary
250,000.00 (NGN) per month. 

What We Offer:


	Opportunity to build a high-growth lifestyle and hospitality brand.
	Creative freedom to shape how properties are positioned in the market.
	Direct impact on bookings, revenue, and brand growth.
	Fast-paced, entrepreneurial work environment.


Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

	Good communication skills.

Method of Application

Ticketing and Tour Officer Job at Talentforge Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Talentforge Solutions Limited (Nigeria) is an HR consulting firm in Lagos focused on recruitment, training, and outsourcing, aiming to link top talent with leading companies through integrity and innovation in HR services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Ticketing and Tour Officer

Job Location: Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Travel and Tour
Work mode: Onsite

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Giving tickets and documents to consumers
	Monitor bookings, revenue, expenses and profitability
	Build and maintain relationships with airlines, hotoes, tour operations and vendors


Requirements


	2+ years in ticketing and tour
	Strong knowledge of travel regulations
	Good communication skills.


Salary
N200,000 monthly net (Negotiable based on experience).

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
